sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀφανίζω

- Transliteration: Aphanizo

- Phonetic: af-an-id'-zo

- Definition:

1. to snatch out of sight, to put out of view, to make unseen

2. to cause to vanish away, to destroy, consume

3. to deprive of lustre, render unsightly

a. to disfigure

- Origin: from G852

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G852; to render unapparent that is (actively) consume (becloud) or (passively) disappear (be destroyed): - corrupt disfigure perish vanish away.
